source_pr.title: ddl/dxf: modify merge sort param at runtime for add-index with global sort
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/57497, ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/57229

This is the second part for supporting dynamic parameters change for add-index with global sort in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/60197:

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

This PR rewrite `MergeOverlappingFiles` with operator, although we can't change the concurrency of merge sort in most cases. Since the subtasks are divided by task concurrency.

And most of the code change is related to the refactor of worker pool:
  - move `OperatorCtx` into `workerpool` package to reuse it for other pipelines. Now we use this context to notify all the operator in pipeline to quit when encountering error.
  - let worker pool handle error directly, to make the error handling logic simpler.
  - abstract `SimpleDataSource` operator to process slice inputs.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [X] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: This PR rewrite `MergeOverlappingFiles` with operator, although we can't change the concurrency of merge sort in most cases.
fix_pattern: This PR rewrite `MergeOverlappingFiles` with operator, although we can't change the concurrency of merge sort in most cases. Since the subtasks are divided by task concurrency.
